expected_findings.message: CardDeclined escapes the checkout endpoint instead of being translated to the documented client error.

repository_context.fixed_missing_evidence: The fixed collector only reads changed files plus Python import/call-name candidates; it does not enumerate this Markdown API contract, so the required CardDeclined-to-422 translation is unavailable to it.
repository_context.manual_verification: The added line calls an injected processor without a CardDeclined handler. The contract requires this endpoint to convert that exception to HTTP 422, so uncaught propagation is a real client-visible defect.
